title: Nedumpura Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple
tagline: Nedumpura Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple is a Shiva temple situated at Nedumpura neighbourhood in Thrissur in the state of Kerala, India.
overview.description: Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple is a Shiva temple situated at Nedumpura neighbourhood in Thrissur in the state of Kerala, India. It is one among the 108 Shiva Temples in Kerala. The sanctum sanctorum of this temple is uniquely shaped as the back of an elephant (Gajaprishtam).

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Cheruthuruthi
topPlaces.description: Cheruthuruthy, also known as Vallathol Nagar, is a small town in India near Wadakkanchery in Thrissur district on the banks of the Nila (Bharathapuzha) River.

topPlaces.name: Kerala Kalamandalam
topPlaces.description: Kerala Kalamandalam, a deemed-to-be-University of Art and Culture by the Government of India, is a major centre for learning Indian performing arts, especially those that developed in the country's southern states, with special emphasis on those from Kerala. The institution, on the banks of the Bharathapuzha river, is situated in the small town of Cheruthuruthi in Thrissur district.

topPlaces.name: Desamangalam
topPlaces.description: Desamangalam is a village in Thrissur district which located in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Mullurkara
topPlaces.description: Mullurkara is a village in Thalapilly Taluk of Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. The Malayalam film actress Philomina was born here.

topPlaces.name: Shoranur
topPlaces.description: Shoranur (Malayalam: [ʂorɳuːr]) is a town and municipality located on the banks of the Bharathapuzha River, in the Palakkad district of Kerala. The town is spread over an area of 32.28 km2.

topPlaces.name: Panjal, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Panjal (IAST: pāññāḷ) is a village near Chelakkara, Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. The village is known for the Athirathram yāgam, held in 1975 and 2011.

topPlaces.name: Pallur, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Pallur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Varavoor
topPlaces.description: Varavoor, a residential village in Thrissur district is in the state of Kerala, India. It is widely believed that this village was situated on the banks of Bharathapuzha during prehistoric times.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nedumpura Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nedumpura Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nedumpura Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (83 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nedumpura Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nedumpura Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nedumpura Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Nedumpura Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nedumpura Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Cheruthuruthi, Kerala Kalamandalam, Desamangalam, Mullurkara, Shoranur.
